citations.quote: the said Court of Edinb University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1.

findings.text: The Notice to Quit states the tenancy is terminated 'as at 1.' but the month/day is illegible in the OCR output.
Tesseract OCR confidence is 65%; the termination date is incomplete. A higher-quality OCR engine or human review is required.
The document is a Notice to Quit dated 20 April 2026 from Edinburgh Napier University to student ANFAL ELBUSHRA.
The garbled OCR (e.g., 'Edinb University', 'Accommogaton') may indicate poor image quality, risking misreading of key dates and names.

proposed_artifacts.content: Re-OCR of NAP-SRC-0020 completed with Tesseract at 65% confidence. The termination date is partially legible: 'as at 1.' followed by an illegible month/day. Recommended next step: use a higher-quality OCR engine (e.g., Azure OCR) or request human review of the original image to resolve the exact termination date.
proposed_artifacts.title: Re-OCR Report for NAP-SRC-0020

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the original WhatsApp image (NAP-SRC-0020) to determine the exact termination date after 'as at 1.' in the Notice to Quit. Record the full date and any other legible details.
proposed_tasks.title: Human review of NAP-SRC-0020 for termination date

risk_flags.description: Low OCR confidence (65%) may cause incorrect extraction of the termination date.

summary: Re-OCR of NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp image of a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University) was performed via Tesseract at 65% confidence. The termination date is partially legible: 'as at 1.' followed by an illegible month/day. The OCR also garbles the university name, address, and other details. A higher-quality OCR pass or human review is needed to resolve the exact termination date.

uncertainties.description: The exact termination date after 'as at 1.' is illegible; could be 1 May, 1 June, etc.
The OCR engine (Tesseract) may have introduced errors; the original image quality is unknown.
